name: handoff
description: Branch-aware, ephemeral session/cross-machine handoff via a hybrid of hooks — Stop (auto-generate), PreCompact (snapshot), SessionStart (restore). One handoff per branch (docs/handoff/<branch>.md, status active|blocked) + a derived status board, so parallel branches/worktrees never collide. Handoffs are for OPEN work only — /handoff resolve deletes a finished one and /handoff prune cleans up orphaned/merged branches, so files don't accumulate. Data lives in the repo's git; the tooling is machine-global. Per-project opt-in (active when docs/handoff/ exists).
